scripts.start:telecaller: cd .. && cd telecalling && npm run dev
scripts.start:hod: cd .. && cd hod && npm run dev
scripts.start:staff: cd .. && cd staff && npm run dev
scripts.start:student: cd .. && cd student && npm run dev
scripts.start:reception: cd .. && cd reception && npm run dev
scripts.start:master: cd .. && cd master && npm run dev
scripts.build:telecaller: cd .. && cd telecalling && npm run build && npm run preview
scripts.build:hod: cd .. && cd hod && npm run build && npm run preview
scripts.build:staff: cd .. && cd staff && npm run build && npm run preview
scripts.build:student: cd .. && cd student && npm run build && npm run preview
scripts.build:reception: cd .. && cd reception && npm run build && npm run preview
scripts.build:master: cd .. && cd master && npm run build && npm run preview
scripts.build:ticket: cd .. && cd ticketsystem && npm run build && npm run preview
scripts.build:video: cd .. && cd videoconfrence && npm run build && npm run preview
scripts.start:all: concurrently -n TELECALLER,HOD,STAFF,STUDENT,RECEPTION,MASTER,TICKET,VIDEO -c yellow,green,blue,red,white,gray,purple,pink "npm run start:telecaller" "npm run start:hod" "npm run start:staff" "npm run start:student" "npm run start:reception" "npm run start:master" "npm run build:ticket" "npm run build:video" "npm run build:telecaller" "npm run build:hod"
scripts.build:all: concurrently -n TELECALLER,HOD,STAFF,STUDENT,RECEPTION,MASTER,TICKET,VIDEO -c yellow,green,blue,red,white,gray,purple,pink "npm run build:telecaller" "npm run build:hod" "npm run build:staff" "npm run build:student" "npm run build:reception" "npm run build:master" "npm run build:ticket" "npm run build:video"
